---
title: "Plots of combined results"
format: html
editor: visual
author: 
- Weronika Oprzędek
---

# Set up

```{r}
out_dir <- "part2/graphs/facets"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(rtracklayer)
library(purrr)
```

# Evolutionary per-position/codon metrics

## import data

```{r}
# Safe import function for phylo/score-based files
safe_import <- function(path, colname){
  # return empty structure if file does not exist
  if(!file.exists(path)) return(data.frame(nt_position = integer(0), setNames(list(numeric(0)), colname)))
  
  # try importing file, return NULL on failure
  obj <- tryCatch(import(path), error = function(e) return(NULL))
  
  # handle empty or failed import
  if(is.null(obj) || length(obj) == 0) return(data.frame(nt_position = integer(0), setNames(list(numeric(0)), colname)))
  
  df <- as.data.frame(obj)
  
  # ensure expected column exists
  if(!"score" %in% colnames(df)) return(data.frame(nt_position = integer(0), setNames(list(numeric(0)), colname)))
  
  # standardize format: position + score
  df <- df %>% mutate(nt_position = start) %>% select(nt_position, score)
  
  # rename score column to requested name
  colnames(df)[colnames(df) == "score"] <- colname
  
  return(df)
}

# gene groups used for aggregation across loci
gene_groups <- c("TRBC","TRBD","TRBJ","TRBV","TRAC","TRAJ","TRAV",
                 "IGHC","IGHD","IGHJ","IGHV","IGKC","IGKJ","IGKV",
                 "IGLC","IGLJ","IGLV")

# build final combined dataset across all gene groups
final_all <- map_dfr(gene_groups, function(gen_group){

  # 1. entropy and coverage per nucleotide position
  entropy_df <- read_csv(paste0("data/coding_region/graphs/", gen_group, "_entropy_per_site.csv")) %>%
    mutate(gen_group = gen_group,
           nt_position = Position,
           codon = ceiling(nt_position / 3)) %>%
    select(gen_group, nt_position, codon, Entropy, Coverage)

  # 2. dN/dS statistics at codon level
  dnds_df <- read_csv(paste0("data/coding_region/dn_ds/dnds_", gen_group, ".csv")) %>%
    mutate(
      codon = Site,
      dn_ds = as.numeric(`dN-dS`),
      dn_ds_pval_up = as.numeric(`P [dN/dS > 1]`),
      dn_ds_pval_down = as.numeric(`P [dN/dS < 1]`)
    ) %>%
    select(codon, dn_ds, dn_ds_pval_up, dn_ds_pval_down)

  # 3. PhyloP acceleration scores + significance flag
  phylop_acc_df <- safe_import(paste0("data/coding_region/phast/", gen_group, "_phyloP_acc.wig"), "phylop_acc") %>%
    mutate(phylop_acc_signif = phylop_acc > 1.3)

  # 4. PhyloP conservation scores + significance flag
  phylop_con_df <- safe_import(paste0("data/coding_region/phast/", gen_group, "_phyloP_con.wig"), "phylop_con") %>%
    mutate(phylop_con_signif = phylop_con > 1.3)

  # 5. PhastCons conservation scores
  phastcons_df <- safe_import(paste0("data/coding_region/phast/", gen_group, "_phastCons.wig"), "phastcons")

  # 6. merge all signals into one per-gene table
  final_df <- entropy_df %>%
    left_join(dnds_df, by = "codon") %>%
    left_join(phylop_acc_df, by = "nt_position") %>%
    left_join(phylop_con_df, by = "nt_position") %>%
    left_join(phastcons_df, by = "nt_position")

  return(final_df)
})
```

## coding sequences

```{r}
plot_metric_by_segment <- function(df,
                                   metric,
                                   output_dir = "plots",
                                   n_bins = 100,
                                   base_height = 1.5,
                                   width = 16) {

  # create output folder if it does not exist
  if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)

  # color mapping for loci
  locus_colors <- c(
    TRA = "#F8766D",
    TRB = "#B79F00",
    IGH = "#00BA38",
    IGK = "#C77CFF",
    IGL = "#619CFF"
  )

  # plot titles for each metric
  metric_titles <- c(
    Entropy   = "Sequence variability (Shannon entropy)",
    phylop    = "Deviation from neutral evolution",
    phastcons = "Evolutionary conservation",
    dn_ds     = "Selective pressure (dN–dS)"
  )

  # axis labels per metric
  metric_labels <- list(
    Entropy = list(
      x = "Relative gene position",
      y = "Shannon entropy"
    ),
    phastcons = list(
      x = "Relative gene position",
      y = "Probability of evolutionary conservation"
    ),
    phylop = list(
      x = "Relative gene position",
      y = "Deviation from neutral evolution\nnegative = constraint, positive = acceleration"
    ),
    dn_ds = list(
      x = "Relative codon position",
      y = "Directional selection strength (dN–dS)"
    )
  )

  # binning function for position-based metrics
  prepare_binned <- function(df, value_col, coord_col = "nt_position") {
    df %>%
      filter(!is.na(.data[[value_col]])) %>%
      group_by(segment, locus, gen_group) %>%
      mutate(
        # normalize position within gene
        rel_pos = .data[[coord_col]] / max(.data[[coord_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
        
        # assign to fixed bins along gene length
        bin = cut(rel_pos, breaks = seq(0,1,length.out = n_bins+1),
                  include.lowest = TRUE, labels = FALSE)
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      group_by(segment, locus, bin) %>%
      summarise(
        # central tendency and spread per bin
        median   = median(.data[[value_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
        q25      = quantile(.data[[value_col]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
        q75      = quantile(.data[[value_col]], 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
        
        # fraction of significant values if available
        sig_frac = if ("sig_frac" %in% colnames(df)) mean(sig_frac, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
        .groups  = "drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(rel_pos = (bin - 0.5)/n_bins)
  }

  # binning for PhyloP (separate acceleration and constraint signals)
  prepare_phylop_binned <- function(df) {

    # acceleration signal
    acc <- df %>%
      filter(!is.na(phylop_acc)) %>%
      group_by(segment, locus, gen_group) %>%
      mutate(
        rel_pos = nt_position/max(nt_position, na.rm=TRUE),
        bin = cut(rel_pos, seq(0,1,length.out = n_bins+1),
                  include.lowest = TRUE, labels=FALSE)
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      group_by(segment, locus, bin) %>%
      summarise(
        median = median(phylop_acc, na.rm=TRUE),
        q25 = quantile(phylop_acc,0.25,na.rm=TRUE),
        q75 = quantile(phylop_acc,0.75,na.rm=TRUE),
        sig_frac = mean(phylop_acc_signif, na.rm=TRUE),
        .groups="drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(rel_pos=(bin-0.5)/n_bins, type="Acceleration")

    # constraint signal
    con <- df %>%
      filter(!is.na(phylop_con)) %>%
      group_by(segment, locus, gen_group) %>%
      mutate(
        rel_pos = nt_position/max(nt_position, na.rm=TRUE),
        bin = cut(rel_pos, seq(0,1,length.out = n_bins+1),
                  include.lowest = TRUE, labels=FALSE)
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      group_by(segment, locus, bin) %>%
      summarise(
        median = median(phylop_con, na.rm=TRUE),
        q25 = quantile(phylop_con,0.25,na.rm=TRUE),
        q75 = quantile(phylop_con,0.75,na.rm=TRUE),
        sig_frac = mean(phylop_con_signif, na.rm=TRUE),
        .groups="drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(rel_pos=(bin-0.5)/n_bins, type="Constraint")

    bind_rows(acc, con)
  }

  # binning for dN/dS values at codon level
  prepare_dnds_binned <- function(df) {
    df %>%
      filter(!is.na(dn_ds)) %>%
      group_by(segment, locus, gen_group) %>%
      mutate(
        rel_pos = codon/max(codon, na.rm=TRUE),
        bin = cut(rel_pos, seq(0,1,length.out=n_bins+1),
                  include.lowest=TRUE, labels=FALSE)
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      group_by(segment, locus, bin) %>%
      summarise(
        median = median(dn_ds, na.rm=TRUE),
        q25 = quantile(dn_ds,0.25,na.rm=TRUE),
        q75 = quantile(dn_ds,0.75,na.rm=TRUE),
        
        # proportion of bins with significant selection signal
        sig_frac = mean(dn_ds_pval_up < 0.05 | dn_ds_pval_down < 0.05, na.rm=TRUE),
        .groups="drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(rel_pos=(bin-0.5)/n_bins)
  }

  # main plotting function
  make_plot <- function(agg, facet=FALSE) {

    # special handling for PhyloP (two directional signals)
    if (metric == "phylop") {
      agg <- agg %>%
        mutate(
          signed_median = ifelse(type == "Acceleration", median, -median),
          ymin = ifelse(type == "Acceleration", q25, -q75),
          ymax = ifelse(type == "Acceleration", q75, -q25)
        )

      p <- ggplot(
        agg,
        aes(rel_pos, signed_median,
            color = locus,
            group = interaction(locus, type))
      ) +
        geom_ribbon(
          aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = locus),
          alpha = 0.15,
          color = NA
        ) +
        geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
        geom_point(
          aes(shape = type, size = sig_frac),
          alpha = 0.7
        ) +
        scale_shape_manual(
          name = "Evolutionary signal",
          values = c(Acceleration = 16, Constraint = 15)
        ) +
        scale_size_continuous(
          name = "Fraction significant",
          range = c(1, 3)
        ) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50")

    } else {

      # default plotting for entropy, phastcons, dn/ds
      y_val <- ifelse(metric=="dn_ds","log_dn_ds","median")
      ribbon_ymin <- ifelse(metric=="dn_ds","log_q25","q25")
      ribbon_ymax <- ifelse(metric=="dn_ds","log_q75","q75")

      p <- ggplot(agg, aes(rel_pos, .data[[y_val]], color=locus, fill=locus)) +
        geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=.data[[ribbon_ymin]], ymax=.data[[ribbon_ymax]]),
                    alpha=0.15, color=NA) +
        geom_line(linewidth=0.7)

      # add significance overlay if present
      if ("sig_frac" %in% colnames(agg)) {
        p <- p + geom_point(aes(size=sig_frac), alpha=0.6) +
          scale_size_continuous(name="Fraction significant", range=c(1,3))
      }
    }

    # shared styling
    p <- p +
      scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
      scale_color_manual(
        name = "Locus",
        values = locus_colors,
        guide = guide_legend(
          override.aes = list(
            shape = NA,
            linetype = 1,
            linewidth = 1
          )
        )
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(name="Locus", values=locus_colors) +
      labs(
        x = metric_labels[[metric]]$x,
        y = metric_labels[[metric]]$y
      ) +
      theme_bw() +
      theme(
        legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(face="bold"),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(face="bold")
      )

    if (facet) p <- p + facet_wrap(~segment, ncol=1, scales="free_y")
    p
  }

  plots <- list()

  # generate per-segment plots
  for (seg in unique(df$segment)) {
    df_seg <- df %>% filter(segment==seg)

    agg <- switch(metric,
                  "Entropy"   = prepare_binned(df_seg, "Entropy"),
                  "phastcons" = prepare_binned(df_seg, "phastcons"),
                  "phylop"    = prepare_phylop_binned(df_seg),
                  "dn_ds"     = prepare_dnds_binned(df_seg))

    if (nrow(agg)==0) next

    # transform phylop values for visualization stability
    if (metric=="phylop") {
      agg <- agg %>% mutate(
        signed_value = ifelse(type=="Acceleration",median,-median),
        ymin = ifelse(type=="Acceleration",q25,-q75),
        ymax = ifelse(type=="Acceleration",q75,-q25)
      )
    }

    # log transform for dn/ds for better scaling
    if (metric=="dn_ds") {
      agg <- agg %>% mutate(
        log_dn_ds = sign(median)*log10(abs(median)+1),
        log_q25 = sign(q25)*log10(abs(q25)+1),
        log_q75 = sign(q75)*log10(abs(q75)+1)
      )
    }

    height_plot <- base_height * 1.5

    p <- make_plot(agg, facet=FALSE) +
      labs(title=paste(metric_titles[[metric]], "-", seg, "segments"))

    plots[[seg]] <- p
  }

  # combined dataset across all segments
  agg_all <- switch(metric,
                    "Entropy"   = prepare_binned(df, "Entropy"),
                    "phastcons" = prepare_binned(df, "phastcons"),
                    "phylop"    = prepare_phylop_binned(df),
                    "dn_ds"     = prepare_dnds_binned(df))

  # same transformations for full dataset
  if (metric=="phylop") {
    agg_all <- agg_all %>% mutate(
      signed_value = ifelse(type=="Acceleration",median,-median),
      ymin = ifelse(type=="Acceleration",q25,-q75),
      ymax = ifelse(type=="Acceleration",q75,-q25)
    )
  }

  if (metric=="dn_ds") {
    agg_all <- agg_all %>% mutate(
      log_dn_ds = sign(median)*log10(abs(median)+1),
      log_q25 = sign(q25)*log10(abs(q25)+1),
      log_q75 = sign(q75)*log10(abs(q75)+1)
    )
  }

  # faceted plot across all segments
  n_seg <- length(unique(agg_all$segment))
  p_faceted <- make_plot(agg_all, facet=TRUE) +
    labs(title=paste(metric_titles[[metric]], "across gene segments"))

  # save faceted plot
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, paste0(metric_titles[[metric]], "_ALL_faceted.png")),
         p_faceted,
         width=width,
         height=base_height * n_seg * 1.5)

  plots[["FACETED"]] <- p_faceted

  return(plots)
}

annotate_segments <- function(df) { 
  # Derive gene segment (V/D/J/C) and locus (TRA/TRB/IGH/IGK/IGL) 
  # from the gene group identifier 
  df %>% 
    mutate( segment = case_when( 
      grepl("V$", gen_group) ~ "V", 
      grepl("D$", gen_group) ~ "D", 
      grepl("J$", gen_group) ~ "J", 
      grepl("C$", gen_group) ~ "C", 
      TRUE ~ NA_character_ ), 
      locus = case_when( 
        grepl("^TRA", gen_group) ~ "TRA", 
        grepl("^TRB", gen_group) ~ "TRB", 
        grepl("^IGH", gen_group) ~ "IGH", 
        grepl("^IGK", gen_group) ~ "IGK", 
        grepl("^IGL", gen_group) ~ "IGL", 
        TRUE ~ NA_character_ )
    ) 
  }

# Annotate input table with segment and locus information
final_all <- annotate_segments(final_all)

# Generate entropy plots
entropy_plots <- plot_metric_by_segment(
  final_all,
  "Entropy",
  output_dir = out_dir
)

# Generate PhyloP plots
phylop_plots <- plot_metric_by_segment(
  final_all,
  "phylop",
  output_dir = out_dir
)

# Generate PhastCons plots
phastcons_plots <- plot_metric_by_segment(
  final_all,
  "phastcons",
  output_dir = out_dir
)

# Generate dN-dS plots
dnds_plots <- plot_metric_by_segment(
  final_all,
  "dn_ds",
  output_dir = out_dir
)
```

## regulatory sequences

```{r}
# Map each detailed subtype to a main type category
subtype_map <- c(
  "3d_rss"     = "RSS",
  "5d_rss"     = "RSS",
  "v_rss"      = "RSS",
  "j_rss"      = "RSS",
  "c_intron"   = "Intron",
  "jc_intron"  = "Intron",
  "l_intron"   = "Intron",
  "v_intron"   = "Intron",
  "c_upstream" = "Upstream",
  "d_upstream" = "Upstream",
  "j_upstream" = "Upstream",
  "v_upstream" = "Upstream"
)

subtype_labels <- c(
  "3d_rss"     = "3′ D RSS",
  "5d_rss"     = "5′ D RSS",
  "v_rss"      = "V RSS",
  "j_rss"      = "J RSS",
  "c_intron"   = "C intron",
  "jc_intron"  = "J–C intron",
  "l_intron"   = "Leader intron",
  "v_intron"   = "V intron",
  "c_upstream" = "C upstream",
  "d_upstream" = "D upstream",
  "j_upstream" = "J upstream",
  "v_upstream" = "V upstream"
)

# Define color palettes for each main type
palette_rss      <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(4, "Set1")
palette_intron   <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(4, "Set2")
palette_upstream <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(4, "Dark2")

# Assign a specific color to each subtype
colors <- c(
  "3d_rss"     = palette_rss[1],
  "5d_rss"     = palette_rss[2],
  "v_rss"      = palette_rss[3],
  "j_rss"      = palette_rss[4],
  "c_intron"   = palette_intron[1],
  "jc_intron"  = palette_intron[2],
  "l_intron"   = palette_intron[3],
  "v_intron"   = palette_intron[4],
  "c_upstream" = palette_upstream[1],
  "d_upstream" = palette_upstream[2],
  "j_upstream" = palette_upstream[3],
  "v_upstream" = palette_upstream[4]
)

# Function to read IQ-TREE rate files
read_iqtree_rates <- function(base_dir) {

  # List all rate files recursively in the base directory
  files <- list.files(
    base_dir,
    pattern = "iqtree_results\\.rate$",
    recursive = TRUE,
    full.names = TRUE
  )

  # Read each file and annotate with subtype and main type
  purrr::map_dfr(files, function(f) {

    folder <- basename(dirname(f))  # folder name indicates subtype
    source <- folder                # save subtype as 'source'

    # Determine main type (RSS/Intron/Upstream/Splice) from folder name
    regulator <- case_when(
      str_detect(folder, "rss")      ~ "RSS",
      str_detect(folder, "intron")   ~ "Intron",
      str_detect(folder, "upstream") ~ "Upstream",
      str_detect(folder, "splice")   ~ "Splice",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )

    # Read the rate file
    readr::read_tsv(
      f,
      comment = "#",
      col_types = cols(
        Site   = col_double(),
        Rate   = col_double(),
        Cat    = col_integer(),
        C_Rate = col_double()
      ),
      show_col_types = FALSE
    ) %>%
      # Annotate each row with subtype and main type
      mutate(
        source    = source,
        regulator = regulator
      )
  })
}

# Function to bin rates along the normalized alignment
prepare_iqtree_binned <- function(df, n_bins = 100) {

  df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(regulator, source) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      rel_pos = Site / max(Site, na.rm = TRUE),
      bin = cut(
        rel_pos,
        breaks = seq(0, 1, length.out = n_bins + 1),
        include.lowest = TRUE,
        labels = FALSE
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::group_by(regulator, source, bin) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      median = median(Rate, na.rm = TRUE),
      q25    = quantile(Rate, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      q75    = quantile(Rate, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(rel_pos = (bin - 0.5) / n_bins)
}

# Function to plot binned IQ-TREE rates with split legends
plot_iqtree <- function(df, n_bins = 100) {

  #subtype-level (color + ribbon)
  agg_subtype <- prepare_iqtree_binned(df, n_bins) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      subtype   = source,
      main_type = subtype_map[subtype]
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(main_type)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      main_type = factor(main_type, levels = c("RSS", "Intron", "Upstream"))
    )

  agg_main <- agg_subtype %>%
    dplyr::group_by(regulator, main_type, rel_pos) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      median = median(median, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  ggplot() +
    #ribbon: SUBTYPES
    geom_ribbon(
      data = agg_subtype,
      aes(
        x = rel_pos,
        ymin = q25,
        ymax = q75,
        fill = subtype,
        group = subtype
      ),
      alpha = 0.15,
      color = NA
    ) +
    #thin colored lines: SUBTYPES
    geom_line(
      data = agg_subtype,
      aes(
        x = rel_pos,
        y = median,
        color = subtype,
        group = subtype
      ),
      linewidth = 0.7,
      alpha = 0.9
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ regulator, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_color_manual(
      name   = "Subtype",
      values = colors,
      labels = subtype_labels
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      name   = "Subtype",
      values = colors,
      labels = subtype_labels
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Substitution rates in regulatory regions",
      x = "Relative alignment position",
      y = "Site-specific substitution rate"
    ) +

    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank()
    )+
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0))
}

# Main execution
base_dir <- "C:/Users/weronikaoprzedek/Desktop/projekt/data/noncoding/iqtree"

# Read all rate files and exclude 'Splice'
df_rates <- read_iqtree_rates(base_dir) %>%
  filter(regulator != "Splice")

# Generate the plot
p <- plot_iqtree(df_rates, 300)
print(p)
# Save the plot as SVG
ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "iqtree_rates.png"),
  p,
  width  = 16,
  height = 2 * length(unique(df_rates$regulator)),
  dpi = 300
)
```

#### entropy

```{r}
#analogous function to coding
plot_entropy_regulatory <- function(df, colors, output_dir = "plots",
                                    n_bins = 100, base_height = 2, width = 12) {

  if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)

  #Binning
  df_binned <- df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(main_type, subtype) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      rel_pos = nt_position / max(nt_position, na.rm = TRUE),
      bin = cut(
        rel_pos,
        breaks = seq(0, 1, length.out = n_bins + 1),
        include.lowest = TRUE,
        labels = FALSE
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::group_by(main_type, subtype, bin) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      median = median(Entropy, na.rm = TRUE),
      q25    = quantile(Entropy, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      q75    = quantile(Entropy, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(rel_pos = (bin - 0.5) / n_bins)

  p <- ggplot() +
    #ribbon
    geom_ribbon(
      data = df_binned,
      aes(
        x = rel_pos,
        ymin = q25,
        ymax = q75,
        fill = subtype,
        group = subtype
      ),
      alpha = 0.15,
      color = NA
    ) +
    #thin colored lines
    geom_line(
      data = df_binned,
      aes(
        x = rel_pos,
        y = median,
        color = subtype,
        group = subtype
      ),
      linewidth = 0.7,
      alpha = 0.9
    ) +
    #thick black line averaged -> removed
    stat_summary(
      data = df_binned,
      aes(
        x = rel_pos,
        y = median,
        group = main_type
      ),
      fun = median,
      geom = "line",
      linewidth = 1,
      color = "black"
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ main_type, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_color_manual(
      name = "Subtype",
      values = colors,
      breaks = names(colors)
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      name = "Subtype",
      values = colors,
      breaks = names(colors)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Shannon entropy in regulatory regions",
      subtitle = "Subtype medians ± IQR; black line = main region trend",
      x = "Relative alignment position",
      y = "Shannon entropy"
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank()
    )

  #save
  ggsave(
    file.path(output_dir, "entropy_regulatory.png"),
    p,
    width  = width,
    height = base_height * length(unique(df_binned$main_type)),
    dpi = 300
  )

  return(p)
}

#run
base_dir <- "C:/Users/weronikaoprzedek/Desktop/projekt/data/noncoding/graphs"

# get all files *_entropy_per_site.csv
files <- list.files(base_dir, pattern = "_entropy_per_site\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

# read files
entropy_df_reg <- map_dfr(files, function(f) {
  
  # get subtype from file name
  file_name <- basename(f)
  subtype <- str_replace(file_name, "_entropy_per_site\\.csv", "")
  
  # skip if subtype name not in map
  if (!subtype %in% names(subtype_map)) {
    message("Skipped file (unknown subtype): ", f)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  main_type <- subtype_map[subtype]
  
  # read CSV
  df <- read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      gen_group = subtype,
      nt_position = Position,
      codon = ceiling(nt_position / 3),
      subtype = subtype,
      main_type = main_type
    ) %>%
    select(gen_group, nt_position, codon, Entropy, Coverage, subtype, main_type)
  
  return(df)
})

p_entropy_reg <- plot_entropy_regulatory(
  entropy_df_reg,
  colors = colors,
  output_dir = out_dir
)
```

# Variants distribution

## summary plots

```{r}
# Compute lengths in kilobases
locus_lengths <- tibble(
  Gene = c("IGH", "IGK", "IGL", "TRA", "TRB"),
  start = c(99839969, 88866370, 22439629, 15819498, 143614080),
  end   = c(101155136, 90790947, 23345823, 16749884, 144169005)
) %>%
  mutate(length_mb = (end - start + 1) / 1e6)


# Function to read all variant summary RDS files for a given class and data type
read_variant_data <- function(base_dir, variant_class, data_type) {
  # Build pattern to match files like "_snv_summary_type_data.rds"
  pattern <- paste0("_", variant_class, "_summary_", data_type, "_data\\.rds$")
  
  # List all matching files recursively and read them into a single data frame
  list.files(
    base_dir,
    pattern = pattern,
    recursive = TRUE,
    full.names = TRUE
  ) %>%
    map_dfr(readRDS)
}

base_dir <- "part2/graphs"

# Read SNV, INDEL, SV summary tables by type and region
snv_types   <- read_variant_data(base_dir, "snv", "type")
snv_regions <- read_variant_data(base_dir, "snv", "region")
indel_types   <- read_variant_data(base_dir, "indel", "type")
indel_regions <- read_variant_data(base_dir, "indel", "region")
sv_types   <- read_variant_data(base_dir, "sv", "type")
sv_regions <- read_variant_data(base_dir, "sv", "region")

# Read "focus" (non-modifier) variants
snv_types_focus   <- read_variant_data(base_dir, "snv", "focus_type")
snv_regions_focus <- read_variant_data(base_dir, "snv", "focus_region")
indel_types_focus   <- read_variant_data(base_dir, "indel", "focus_type")
indel_regions_focus <- read_variant_data(base_dir, "indel", "focus_region")
sv_types_focus   <- read_variant_data(base_dir, "sv", "focus_type")
sv_regions_focus <- read_variant_data(base_dir, "sv", "focus_region")

# Define gene and region factor levels
gene_levels   <- c("TRA", "TRB", "IGH", "IGK", "IGL")
region_levels <- c("AFR", "AMR", "EAS", "EUR", "SAS")

# Assign colors to each locus for consistent plotting
locus_colors <- c(
  TRA = "#F8766D",
  TRB = "#B79F00",
  IGH = "#00BA38",
  IGK = "#C77CFF",
  IGL = "#619CFF"
)

# Convert gene/region columns to factors with consistent ordering
snv_types <- snv_types %>% mutate(Gene = factor(Gene, levels = gene_levels))
indel_types <- indel_types %>% mutate(Gene = factor(Gene, levels = gene_levels))
sv_types <- sv_types %>% mutate(Gene = factor(Gene, levels = gene_levels))
snv_types_focus <- snv_types_focus %>% mutate(Gene = factor(Gene, levels = gene_levels))
indel_types_focus <- indel_types_focus %>% mutate(Gene = factor(Gene, levels = gene_levels))
sv_types_focus <- sv_types_focus %>% mutate(Gene = factor(Gene, levels = gene_levels))

snv_regions <- snv_regions %>% mutate(Region = factor(Region, levels = region_levels))
indel_regions <- indel_regions %>% mutate(Region = factor(Region, levels = region_levels))
sv_regions <- sv_regions %>% mutate(Region = factor(Region, levels = region_levels))

# Function to plot variant counts per gene, faceted by variant type
plot_variant_type <- function(df, title, locus_colors) {
  df <- df %>%
    left_join(locus_lengths, by = "Gene") %>%
    mutate(n_per_mb = n / length_mb)

  ggplot(df, aes(x = Gene, y = n_per_mb, fill = Gene)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    facet_wrap(~ Variant_Type, scales = "free_y", ncol = 8) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = locus_colors) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Locus",
      y = "Variants per Mb"
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
}


# Function to plot mean variants per sample by region, faceted by variant type
plot_region_profile <- function(df, title, locus_colors, normalize_by_length = TRUE) {
  if (normalize_by_length) {
    df <- df %>%
      left_join(locus_lengths, by = "Gene") %>%
      mutate(mean_mut_per_mb = mean_mut / length_mb)
    
    y_col <- "mean_mut_per_mb"
    y_label <- "Mean variants per Mb per sample"
    
  } else {
    y_col <- "mean_mut"
    y_label <- "Mean variants per sample"
  }
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Region, y = .data[[y_col]], color = Gene)) +
    geom_point(
      position = position_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0),
      size = 2.5,
      alpha = 0.8
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ Variant_Type, scales = "free_y", ncol = 8) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = locus_colors) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Region",
      y = y_label,
      color = "Locus"
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.direction = "horizontal",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.box = "horizontal",
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7)
    )
}

variant_sets <- list(
  SNV = list(
    types   = snv_types,
    regions = snv_regions
  ),
  INDEL = list(
    types   = indel_types,
    regions = indel_regions
  ),
  SV = list(
    types   = sv_types,
    regions = sv_regions
  )
)

for (v in names(variant_sets)) {

  # Set figure height depending on variant class
  fig_height <- if (v == "SNV") 3 else 3

  # Variant type distribution
  p1 <- plot_variant_type(
    variant_sets[[v]]$types,
    paste(v, "variant type distribution"),
    locus_colors
  )

  ggsave(
    file.path(out_dir, paste0(v, "_variant_types.png")),
    p1,
    width = 16,
    height = fig_height,
    dpi = 300
  )

  # Regional mutation burden
  p2 <- plot_region_profile(
    variant_sets[[v]]$regions,
    paste(v, ": variant type distribution across loci and populations"),
    locus_colors
  )

  ggsave(
    file.path(out_dir, paste0(v, "_region_profiles.png")),
    p2,
    width = 16.5,
    height = fig_height + 0.5,
    dpi = 300
  )
}
```

## combined - region plot

```{r}
library(patchwork)

plot_region_profile <- function(df, subtitle, locus_colors,
                                normalize_by_length = TRUE,
                                show_legend = FALSE,
                                show_y = TRUE,
                                show_x = TRUE) {

  if (normalize_by_length) {
    df <- df %>%
      left_join(locus_lengths, by = "Gene") %>%
      mutate(mean_mut_per_mb = mean_mut / length_mb)

    y_col <- "mean_mut_per_mb"
    y_label <- "Mean variants per Mb per sample"

  } else {
    y_col <- "mean_mut"
    y_label <- "Mean variants per sample"
  }

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Region, y = .data[[y_col]], color = Gene)) +
    geom_point(
      position = position_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0),
      size = 2.5,
      alpha = 0.8
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ Variant_Type, scales = "free_y", ncol = 8) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = locus_colors) +
    labs(
      subtitle = subtitle,
      x = if (show_x) "Region" else NULL,
      y = if (show_y) y_label else NULL,
      color = "Locus"
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 8),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      legend.position = if (show_legend) "top" else "none",
      legend.direction = "horizontal",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.box = "horizontal",
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
      plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
    )

  return(p)
}

# Create individual plots
p_snv <- plot_region_profile(
  snv_regions,
  "SNV",
  locus_colors,
  show_legend = TRUE,
  show_y = FALSE,
  show_x = FALSE
)

p_indel <- plot_region_profile(
  indel_regions,
  "INDEL",
  locus_colors,
  show_legend = FALSE,
  show_y = TRUE,
  show_x = FALSE
)

p_sv <- plot_region_profile(
  sv_regions,
  "SV",
  locus_colors,
  show_legend = FALSE,
  show_y = FALSE,
  show_x = TRUE
)

combined_plot <-
  (p_snv / p_indel / p_sv) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

final_plot <-
  combined_plot +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Variant burden across loci and populations",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5)
    )
  )

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "combined_regions.png"),
  final_plot,
  width = 16,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300
)
```

# Correlation of haplotype frequency profiles

```{r}
input_dir <- "part2"
in_tbl_dir <- file.path(input_dir, "tables")

# loci to iterate over
loci <- c("TRB", "TRA", "IGH", "IGK", "IGL")

# read all correlation matrices and convert to long format
correlations_long <- map_dfr(loci, function(locus) {

  read_csv(
    file.path(in_tbl_dir, paste0(locus, "_correlation.csv")),
    show_col_types = FALSE
  ) %>%
    rename_with(~ "row_pop", .cols = 1) %>%   # ensure first column is population name
    pivot_longer(
      cols = -row_pop,
      names_to = "col_pop",
      values_to = "rho"
    ) %>%
    mutate(locus = locus)
})

# remove self-correlations and standardize population pairs
correlations_long <- correlations_long %>%
  filter(row_pop != col_pop) %>%
  mutate(
    # create order-independent population pair key
    pair = map2_chr(row_pop, col_pop, ~ paste(sort(c(.x, .y)), collapse = "–"))
  ) %>%
  distinct(locus, pair, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# compute mean correlation per population pair (across loci entries)
correlations_long <- correlations_long %>%
  group_by(pair) %>%
  mutate(pair_mean = mean(rho, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    # reorder pairs by overall mean correlation for better plot structure
    pair = reorder(pair, pair_mean)
  )

# consistent color palette for loci
locus_colors <- c(
  TRA = "#F8766D",
  TRB = "#B79F00",
  IGH = "#00BA38",
  IGK = "#C77CFF",
  IGL = "#619CFF"
)

# main plot: correlations across population pairs and loci
p <- ggplot(correlations_long,
       aes(x = pair, y = rho, color = locus)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.7, alpha = 0.85) +
  facet_wrap(~ locus, nrow = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_color_manual(values = locus_colors, guide = "none") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Population pair",
    y = "Spearman correlation of haplotype frequency profiles",
    title = "Similarity of immune receptor haplotype composition across populations"
  ) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank()
  )

# save figure to file
ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "correlations.png"),
  p,
  height = 4,
  width = 7,
  dpi = 300
)
```
